# descriptor-kit — status

<!-- GENERATED by descriptor-kit (status) by EXECUTING the forcing-function checks. A claim is BACKED only if its checks pass right now — it cannot overclaim. Do not edit by hand. -->

**1 of 3 value props fully backed** · 1 evidence-backed (merged PR / recorded run, not a live check) · 1 learning goals.

## What it does today

- A malformed descriptor is rejected before it can generate anything.
  - vs hand-written docs: a typo in the source fails fast at parse, not silently in the output.
- A README's facts cannot drift from their source without failing CI. _(evidence-backed)_
  - vs a hand-maintained README: drift is a build failure, not a stale line nobody notices.

## Learning goals (what's next)

- descriptor aggregate (org-map / profile / knowledge nodes) — not built yet — planned as the next capability after prx-parity
